author: aikaterna
evilout666
description: Reads and posts from RSS feeds using a simplified, button-based administrative panel.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not persistently store data or metadata about users.
install_msg: Thanks for installing. Use the `[p]afterworkrss` command to deploy the setup panel. Use `[p]rssremove <name>` to remove a feed via command line.
